questions.name: Comparch - Harvard Architecture: Computer Instruction Sequence
questions.questiontext: What will be the content of register A (accumulator) in a Harvard architecture computer after executing the following instruction sequence? The numbers in the instructions are given in decimal. Provide your answer in hexadecimal as a 16-bit word, without any additional symbols.
questions.code:
LDC 129
ST 129
LDC 3478
ST 117
LD 129
SUB 117

questions.name: Comparch - x86: Register Operations
questions.questiontext: What will be the content of the AX register in x86 architecture after executing the following instruction sequence? The numbers in the instructions are given in decimal. Provide your answer in hexadecimal as a 16-bit word, without any additional symbols.
questions.code:
MOV AX, 120
MOV [120], AX
MOV AX, 4567
MOV [200], AX
MOV AX, [120]
SUB AX, [200]
